mapper.select: SELECT ID, INQUIRE_TYPE, INQUIRE_EMAIL, INQUIRE_TITLE, INQUIRE_CONTENT, INQUIRE_ANSWER, INQUIRE_FILE_URL, INQUIRE_STATUS, INQUIRE_CREATE_AT FROM TBL_INQUIRE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ID DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INQUIRE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT ID, INQUIRE_TYPE, INQUIRE_EMAIL, INQUIRE_TITLE, INQUIRE_CONTENT, INQUIRE_FILE_URL, INQUIRE_STATUS, INQUIRE_CREATE_AT, USER_ID FROM TBL_INQUIRE WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_INQUIRE SET INQUIRE_ANSWER = #{inquireAnswer}, INQUIRE_STATUS = '답변완료' WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT I.ID, I.INQUIRE_TYPE, I.INQUIRE_EMAIL, I.INQUIRE_TITLE, I.INQUIRE_CONTENT, I.INQUIRE_ANSWER, I.INQUIRE_FILE_URL, I.INQUIRE_STATUS, I.INQUIRE_CREATE_AT, I.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME FROM TBL_INQUIRE I LEFT JOIN TBL_USER U ON I.USER_ID = U.ID ORDER BY I.ID DESC
